title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Support local Atlanta comedians at Laughing Skull Lounge — one of the city's best intimate comedy venues. Saturday night at 8PM (doors 7:30PM), 21+. Grab tickets and split some appetizers.
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 832 Quinn St NW, Atlanta
vibe: Intimate, hilarious, casual — great for getting someone to genuinely laugh

title: 404 Day in Piedmont Park
description: Atlanta's signature community celebration — free outdoor festival with live music, food trucks, local vendors, and art installations. Saturday 12–9PM. Great excuse to wander, people-watch, and soak up the city.
vibe: Festive, outdoors, relaxed — perfect for a laid-back daytime date

title: Vegetarian Date Night at La Semilla
description: Rated 4.9 stars — one of Atlanta's top-rated vegetarian spots. Creative Latin-inspired plant-based dishes, great cocktails, and a cozy vibe in the East Atlanta Village area. Weekend reservations recommended.
location: La Semilla, 780 Memorial Dr SE 4a, Atlanta
vibe: Romantic, intimate, food-forward — impressive without being pretentious
